## Problem

<!-- What's painful or missing today? Concrete user story preferred. -->

## Proposal

<!-- What would you like added or changed? Sketch the CLI surface or doc shape. -->

```bash
# example invocation, if applicable
piapi-cli <new-subcommand> ...
```

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you try, and why is this the right shape? -->

## Scope check

- [ ] Stays within "thin `requests` wrapper" philosophy (no large abstractions).
- [ ] Affects an existing PiAPI surface (model, task type, webhook, LLM).
- [ ] Documentation impact identified (`references/*`, `examples/*`, `README.md`).
